title: TwoSet Violin: Sacrilegious Games
full_description: TwoSet Violin combines virtuoso classical performances, comedy, and theatrical challenges in a genre-bending concert featuring new arrangements and playful reinterpretations of iconic classics. The duo take on onstage challenges while performing live — hula-hooping, charades, audience votes — while still delivering serious playing. New arrangements of Paganini's La Campanella, mashups, and concerto movements voted for by the crowd.
ai_summary: Australian violin duo Brett Yang and Eddy Chen (TwoSet Violin) blend classical virtuosity with comedy chaos — performing Paganini, Rimsky-Korsakov, and more while taking on hula-hoop challenges, audience charades, and playful musical mashups.
